rationale: The Write=False session was Read-Only, and explicit ACE BooleanExpr Set changes must not be made permanent; the later Get returns the original Admins value, so the read-only change did not persist.

rationale: After Authority column 16 was set to 1 in a Read-Write session, a later Write=False Set to 0 should not persist; the target Get returning 1 follows the Read-Only nonpersistence rule.
